backstory.original: Brother Uriah Macawber is a native of Ravenloft, born in the dread domain of Darkon under the iron rule of Azalin Rex. After a horrifying childhood encounter at the Carnival with the demonic entity known as The Caller, Uriah would embrace the worship of the goddess Ezra, Lady of the Mists, offering protection from the forces of darkness to all those in need. Upon joining with the other future members of The Black Dice Society at the infamous House of Lament, Uriah would go on to find true love with his teammate, the undead Aasimar, Nahara... and would eventually discover the dark truth of both the nature of his deity and his mysterious connection to his former liege, the lich-king Azalin Rex.
backstory.display: 乌利亚修士是鸦阁魔域的本地居民，出生在亚扎林·雷克斯铁腕统治下的恐惧领域达孔。自从幼年时期，在嘉年华上与被称为“召唤者”的邪恶人物的一次可怕遭遇后，乌利亚开启了对迷雾女神伊丝拉的崇拜，为所有需要帮助的人提供抵御黑暗的力量。在臭名昭著的哀悼之家与黑骰子协会的其他未来成员汇合后，乌利亚继续与他的队友亡灵神裔纳哈拉一起寻找真爱......并最终发现自身的神性本质，以及他与前主宰，巫妖王亚扎林·雷克斯之间存在神秘纽带的黑暗真相。

description.original: Uriah points at a random enemy and deals damage, preferring enemies that are already damaged.
description.display: 乌利亚指向一名随机敌人并造成伤害，偏好已经受到伤害的敌人。

description.original: Brother Uriah creates a wall of magical blades that damages enemies for 10 seconds.
description.display: 乌利亚修士创造一道魔法刀墙，伤害敌人 10 秒。

longDescription.original: Brother Uriah creates a wall of whirling, razor-sharp blades of magical energy and sends them flying across the area. The blades come to a stop a short distance in front of the formation forming a barrier that lasts for 10 seconds. Each time an enemy passes through the barrier, they take ultimate damage.
longDescription.display: 乌利亚修士创造一面由旋转的锋利魔法能量刀构成的墙，并使其在区域内飞掠。刀在阵型前方近距离处停下，形成持续 10 秒的屏障。每当敌人通过屏障时，都会受到杀招伤害。

description.original: Brother Uriah buffs the damage of Champions in his column and the column behind
description.display: 乌利亚修士提高同列和后列勇士的伤害

name.original: In the Grip of Azalin Rex

description.original: Occasionally, Azalin Rex takes over Brother Uriah, boosting the damage of Nahara and evil Champions.
description.display: 亚扎林·雷克斯有时会控制乌利亚修士，提高纳哈拉和邪恶勇士的伤害。

description.desc: $(source_hero) increases the damage of all Champions in his column and the column behind him by $(amount)%.
$(source_hero)使同列和后列所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%。

tipText.original: Brother Uriah increases the damage of Champons in his column and the column behind.
tipText.display: 乌利亚修士提高同列和后列勇士的伤害。

description.pre: $(source_hero) heals all champions within two slots for $(not_buffed amount) health per second. This effect is increased by $(amount___2)% for each formation slot containing a dead or undead Champion or an escort, stacking additively and applying multiplicatively.
$(source_hero)每秒为身边两格内的所有勇士回复 $(not_buffed amount) 生命值。阵型中每有一个栏位包含已死亡勇士、亡灵勇士或护卫，此效果提升 $(amount___2)%，以加算方式堆叠并以乘算方式生效。

tipText.original: Brother Uriah heals all Champions within 2 slots of him.
tipText.display: 乌利亚修士治疗距离他 2 个栏位内的所有勇士。

name.original: In the Grip of Azalin Rex

description.pre: After $(attack_count) normal attacks by Champions in the formation, Azalin Rex takes over $(source_hero) for $(seconds_plural amount). While controlled by Azalin Rex, $(source_hero) increases the damage of Nahara and all evil Champions by $(amount___2)%.
阵型中的勇士进行 $(attack_count) 次普通攻击后，亚扎林·雷克斯控制$(source_hero)，持续 $(seconds_plural amount)。被亚扎林·雷克斯控制期间，$(source_hero) 使纳哈拉和所有邪恶勇士的伤害提高 $(amount__2)%。

description.desc: Brother Uriah gains the Hunter role and reads from the Book of Exalted Deeds, making Undead and Fiends his Favored Foes and all Champions deal an additional $(amount)% damage to them.
乌利亚修士获得猎人角色，他阅读《崇善之书》，将亡灵和炼狱生物视为他的偏好对手，所有勇士对它们额外造成 $(amount)% 的伤害。

specializationDescription.original: Brother Uriah fights his evil connection, helping champions defeat the Undead and Fiends.
specializationDescription.display: 乌利亚修士抵抗他的邪恶纽带，帮助勇士击败亡灵和炼狱生物。

description.desc: Azalin reads from the Book of Vile Darkness, increasing the effect of $(upgrade_name id) by $(amount)%.
亚扎林阅读《邪恶之书》，使$(upgrade_name id)的效果提高 $(amount)%。

specializationDescription.original: Brother Uriah embraces his evil connection, helping evil champions deal even more damage.
specializationDescription.display: 乌利亚修士拥抱他的邪恶纽带，帮助邪恶勇士造成更高伤害。

description.display: 我为你的烦恼感到遗憾。

description.original: Um, I'm not positive that you, ah, have the right fellow.
description.display: 呃，我不确定你的同伴足够靠谱。

description.original: Perhaps, we should consider reconvening at some other location?
description.display: 也许，我们应该考虑去其他地方集会？

description.original: We must, I suppose, find our courage and press onward.
description.display: 我们可能必须鼓起勇气，继续前进。

description.original: In all things Ezra's guidance provides.
My goddess holds secrets I could never have fathomed.
description.display: 我的女神掌握着我永远无法理解的秘密。

description.original: I remain, I'm afraid, within the darklord's foul reach.
description.display: 恐怕我仍处于黑暗领主的邪恶掌控之中。

description.original: I commend myself to the pure hands of Ezra.
description.display: 我将自己奉献给伊丝拉的纯洁双手。

effects.description: Increases $(upgrade_name id) to heal targets within three slots

description.original: What plans he has for me I cannot say, only that they must be dire.
description.display: 我无法确定他对我有什么计划，只能说肯定很可怕。

effects.description: Increases the duration of Brother Uriah's 'In the Grip of Azalin Rex' ability by $amount%

description.original: The dead will rise and do Azalin's bidding, er, my bidding.
description.display: 亡者将会崛起，听从亚扎林的......呃，我的命令。

effects.description: Increases the duration of Brother Uriah's 'In the Grip of Azalin Rex' ability by $amount%

description.original: Beside Nahara, one could say I am a braver man.
description.display: 与纳哈拉相比，应该说我更勇敢。

character_sheet_details.backstory: Brother Uriah Macawber is a native of Ravenloft, born in the dread domain of Darkon under the iron rule of Azalin Rex. After a horrifying childhood encounter at the Carnival with the demonic entity known as The Caller, Uriah would embrace the worship of the goddess Ezra, Lady of the Mists, offering protection from the forces of darkness to all those in need. Upon joining with the other future members of The Black Dice Society at the infamous House of Lament, Uriah would go on to find true love with his teammate, the undead Aasimar, Nahara... and would eventually discover the dark truth of both the nature of his deity and his mysterious connection to his former liege, the lich-king Azalin Rex.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Brother Uriah is a Support and Healing champion who can provides an extra damage boost to evil Champions
